site.name: CryptoBets.com
site.tagline: The Most Trusted Crypto Gambling Guide
site.description: CryptoBets.com is the definitive guide to crypto casinos, sportsbooks, poker rooms, exchanges, and wallets. We test every platform with real cryptocurrency deposits.

scoring_weights.description: Weighted formula used to calculate overall ratings

authors.name: Marcus Chen
authors.bio: Marcus has been covering crypto gambling since 2018, testing over 200 platforms with real deposits. Former fintech journalist turned full-time crypto casino analyst. Based in Singapore, he specializes in regulatory analysis, provably fair verification, and VIP program comparisons.

authors.name: Elena Volkov
authors.bio: Elena is a blockchain developer and exchange specialist with a background in quantitative finance. She has built DeFi protocols and audited smart contracts for top-tier firms. Her exchange reviews focus on security architecture, fee structures, and liquidity depth.

authors.name: James Okonkwo
authors.bio: James is a professional poker player who discovered crypto poker in 2019 and never looked back. He has cashed in multiple CSOP tournaments on CoinPoker and has played millions of hands across every major crypto poker room. His reviews cover rake structures, traffic quality, and tournament value.

authors.name: Sarah Nakamura
authors.bio: Sarah leads the CryptoBets testing team, personally processing 500+ real withdrawals per year across every platform we review. She is also our crypto wallet specialist, with expertise in hardware wallet security, seed phrase management, and DeFi wallet safety. Based in Tokyo.
